cities.name: 北京
cities.description: China's ancient capital, home to the Forbidden City, Great Wall, and imperial treasures. Modern metropolis blending 3,000 years of history with cutting-edge culture.

cities.name: 上海
cities.description: China's financial hub and most international city. Skyline views, historic Bund, and vibrant arts scene where East meets West.

cities.name: 广州
cities.description: Cantonese culture heartland, famous for dim sum, Cantonese opera, and the Pearl River. Major trade port with colonial heritage.

cities.name: 西安
cities.description: Ancient capital of 13 dynasties, home to the Terracotta Warriors and starting point of the Silk Road. Rich Tang dynasty heritage.

cities.name: 成都
cities.description: Capital of Sichuan, home to giant pandas and legendary spicy cuisine. Laid-back lifestyle and beautiful nearby nature reserves.

cities.name: 桂林
cities.description: World-famous for stunning karst landscapes rising from the Li River. UNESCO site with ancient villages and outdoor adventures.

cities.name: 杭州
cities.description: Home of West Lake, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Known for Longjing tea, silk, and as headquarters of Alibaba.

cities.name: 重庆
cities.description: Mountain city famous for hot pot and Yangtze River cruises. Largest city by population with stunning architecture and fog.

cities.name: 大理
cities.description: Bai minority culture hub on Erhai Lake. Cycling paradise with ancient town, temples, and relaxed backpacker atmosphere.

cities.name: 南京
cities.description: Ancient capital of six dynasties. UNESCO Ming Xiaoling Tomb, Purple Mountain, and tragic history museum.

cities.name: 苏州
cities.description: Venice of the East with UNESCO classical gardens. Silk capital with canals, canals, canals, and refined Jiangnan culture.

cities.name: 深圳
cities.description: China's tech hub and fastest-growing city. Theme parks, shopping, and gateway to Hong Kong.

cities.name: 厦门
cities.description: Coastal beauty with Gulangyu Island, a UNESCO site. Amoy cuisine, colonial architecture, and overseas Chinese heritage.

cities.name: 青岛
cities.description: German colonial heritage, Tsingtao brewery, and stunning coastal scenery. Clean beaches and Germanic architecture.

cities.name: 昆明
cities.description: Spring City with year-round mild climate. Gateway to Yunnan with Stone Forest UNESCO site and minority cultures.

cities.name: 丽江
cities.description: Ancient Naxi kingdom with UNESCO Old Town. Jade Dragon Snow Mountain backdrop and traditional Dongba culture.

cities.name: 张家界
cities.description: UNESCO forest parks with towering sandstone pillars. Avatar Hallelujah Mountains inspiration, glass bridges, and hiking trails.

cities.name: 三亚
cities.description: Tropical paradise on Hainan Island. Pristine beaches, diving, Wuzhizhou Island, and year-round warm weather.

cities.name: 武汉
cities.description: Central China hub at Yangtze River junction. Cherry blossoms at East Lake, Yangtze bridges, and hot dry noodles.

cities.name: 长沙
cities.description: Hunan Province capital with Orange Island on Xiang River. Spicy Hunan cuisine, ancestral home of Chairman Mao, and cultural scene.

cities.name: 天津
cities.description: Port city near Beijing with colonial concessions. Italian Architecture Zone, ancient food street, and modern skyline.

cities.name: 哈尔滨
cities.description: Ice and snow capital with world-famous Ice Snow Festival. Russian architecture, ice sculptures, and freezing winters.

cities.name: 大连
cities.description: Coastal gem with Russian and Japanese colonial heritage. Clean beaches, Xinghai Square, and seafood capital.

cities.name: 宁波
cities.description: Ancient port city and home of Tianyi Pavilion. Modern skyline, Putuo Buddhist temple, and maritime heritage.

cities.name: 承德
cities.description: Summer resort of Qing emperors. Mountain summer palace, imperial temples, and nearby grasslands.

cities.name: 郑州
cities.description: Capital of Henan and ancient Shang dynasty center. Railway hub, Yellow River proximity, and Shaolin nearby.

cities.name: 洛阳
cities.description: Ancient capital of 13 dynasties. Longmen Grottoes UNESCO site, Shaolin Temple, and peony flowers.

cities.name: 开封
cities.description: Northern Song dynasty capital. Famous Night Market, Millennium City Park, and well-preserved Song dynasty walls.

cities.name: 平遥
cities.description: UNESCO preserved ancient walled city. Best-preserved Ming-Qing era city walls, banking heritage, and traditional atmosphere.

cities.name: 黄山
cities.description: UNESCO Yellow Mountain with dramatic rock formations and sea of clouds. Ancient villages of Hongcun and Xidi.

cities.name: 扬州
cities.description: Ancient canal city of Yangtze Delta. Slender West Lake, traditional breakfast culture, and refined Jiangnan elegance.

cities.name: 太原
cities.description: Capital of Shanxi Province. Coal industry center, Jinci Temple, and gateway to Pingyao.

cities.name: 济南
cities.description: City of springs with 72 famous springs. Home of Daming Lake, Black Tiger Spring, and Confucius birthplace nearby.

cities.name: 烟台
cities.description: Coastal wine-making city. French spring water, penglai fairy island legends, and apple orchards.

cities.name: 威海
cities.description: Clean coastal city near Korea. Sandy beaches, summer resorts, and gateway to Liu Gongdao.

cities.name: 福州
cities.description: Capital of Fujian Province. Fuzhou-style fried rice noodles, pagodas, and ancient Sanfang Qixiang neighborhood.

cities.name: 泉州
cities.description: Maritime Silk Road starting point. UNESCO site with diverse religions, Fujian's cultural heartland.

cities.name: 南昌
cities.description: Capital of Jiangxi Province. Poyang Lake, Tengwang Pavilion, and revolutionary heritage.

cities.name: 九江
cities.description: Gateway to Lushan Mountain. Poyang Lake, Yangtze River port, and climbing at Lushan UNESCO.

cities.name: 石家庄
cities.description: Capital of Hebei Province. Railway hub, normal college heritage, and base for Zhaozhou Bridge visits.

cities.name: 宜昌
cities.description: Yangtze River cruise starting point. Three Gorges Dam, Xiling Gorge, and scenic river gorges.

cities.name: 岳阳
cities.description: Dongting Lake city with ancient Yueyang Tower. Stunning lake views and migratory bird sanctuary.

cities.name: 沈阳
cities.description: Manchurian imperial capital. Imperial palace, former Japanese concession, and heavy industry heritage.

cities.name: 丹东
cities.description: Border city with North Korea. Yalu River, Dandong Bridge, and one-day Korea tours.

cities.name: 呼伦贝尔
cities.description: Vast grasslands of Inner Mongolia. Traditional Mongolian culture, horse riding, and pristine natural beauty.

cities.name: 西宁
cities.description: Gateway to Qinghai-Tibet Plateau. Kumbum Monastery, taoist temple, and plateau travel base.

cities.name: 兰州
cities.description: Yellow River flows through. Beef noodles capital, Silk Road gateway, and ancient mother river.

cities.name: 敦煌
cities.description: Silk Road oasis. Mogao Caves UNESCO site, Singing Sand Dune, and Crescent Lake.

cities.name: 乌鲁木齐
cities.description: Capital of Xinjiang. Heavenly South Mountain, Uygur culture, and gateway to Central Asia.

cities.name: 喀什
cities.description: Ancient Silk Road trading hub. Sunday Grand Bazaar, Old Town, and Uygur culture heartland.

cities.name: 榆林
cities.description: Gateway to the Gobi Desert. Ancient Great Wall forts, desert scenery, and Red Stone Gorge.

cities.name: 咸阳
cities.description: Ancient Qin capital neighbor. Imperial tombs, airport hub, and Terracotta Warriors location.

cities.name: 台北
cities.description: Taiwan's capital. Night markets, Taipei 101, National Palace Museum, and vibrant street food culture.

sources: Public population statistics and geographic coordinates
metadata.note: All cities have basic info (slug, name, nameEn, population, coordinates, timezone, description). Cover images use placeholder Unsplash URLs that should be replaced with city-specific photos.
